times.policy:
Mahalo for your reservation!  

• Smart Casual Attire - no sheer/see-through garments for ladies & no tank tops for men.
• Specific table requests can be noted, but not guaranteed. 
• We have a small parking lot, so complimentary valet parking only. Please do not arrive more than 15 minutes prior to your reservation.   
• No public Wifi access is available
• To preserve the ambiance for the more intimate diners, we do not do group bookings.  Single table reservations with a maximum of 8 guests only. We strongly advise you not to book multiple reservations as they will be treated as separate reservations and will not be seated near each other or be seated at the same time.
• We do require that children remain seated throughout the dining experience for their safety and the safety of our staff & other guests. 
• Reservations sold on third party websites will not be honored, and future reservations will be subject to cancellation.
• Any increase or decrease in party size, No-Shows or Cancellations less than 1 day in advance will be charged $50 per person to the credit card on file. 
• Our menu changes daily: https://mamasfishhouse.com/menus/lunch-and-dinner/
times.cancellation_policy: A credit card is required to secure all reservations. Any increase or decrease in party size, No-Shows or Cancellations less than 1 day in advance will be charged $50 per person to the credit card on file.
